name: Shufti Pro
description: Shufti Pro — KYC and AML verification API with real-time document scanning, face verification, and PEP/sanctions screening.

seo.title: Shufti Pro — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Shufti Pro: Shufti Pro — KYC and AML verification API with real-time document scanning, face verification, and PEP/sanctions screening.

when_to_use: Real-time document scan and OCR for global KYC onboarding
Face verification with liveness for financial account opening
PEP and OFAC sanctions screening in KYC workflow
AML screening API for crypto exchange compliance
Background check integration for gig economy platforms

pros: Document, face and AML screening in one API
Aggressive pricing vs Onfido or Jumio
cons: Mixed reports on accuracy for edge-case IDs
Less enterprise trust than tier-1 brands
Data residency options limited in some plans
review.verdict: Budget full-stack KYC/AML API with broad coverage; great on price, test accuracy for your mix.
review.best_for: Global fintechs and marketplaces wanting a low-cost all-in-one KYC and AML API
review.not_for: Highly regulated banks that need tier-1 accuracy benchmarks and strict data residency guarantees
